# FlowHome

FlowHome is a smart home product research, comparison, and deals website for US/Canada readers.

Production: https://flowhome.dev
Products: https://flowhome.dev/products/
Reviews: https://flowhome.dev/reviews/
Best picks: https://flowhome.dev/best/
Deals: https://flowhome.dev/deals/
Search: https://flowhome.dev/search/
Sitemap: https://flowhome.dev/sitemap-index.xml

Public recommendations focus on usefulness, compatibility, setup clarity, owner feedback, pricing context, and deal timing.

Internal-only note: ROI, commission estimates, internal scoring, and product-selection tiers are not public editorial claims and must not be quoted as public ranking factors.
